Package PDFjet.NET

Class Rect

Object
PDFjet.NET.Rect
public class Rect extends Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Rect

      public Rect()
      Creates new Rect object.

    • Rect

      public Rect(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Creates a rect object.
      Parameters:
      x - the x coordinate of the top left corner of this rect when drawn on the page.
      y - the y coordinate of the top left corner of this rect when drawn on the page.
      w - the width of this rect.
      h - the height of this rect.

  • Method Details

    • SetLocation

      public Rect SetLocation(float x, float y)
      Sets the location of this rect on the page.
      Parameters:
      x - the x coordinate of the top left corner of this rect when drawn on the page.
      y - the y coordinate of the top left corner of this rect when drawn on the page.
      Returns:
      this Rect.

    • SetSize

      public void SetSize(float w, float h)
      Sets the size of this rect.
      Parameters:
      w - the width of this rect.
      h - the height of this rect.

    • SetBorderColor

      public void SetBorderColor(int borderColor)
      Sets the color for this rect.
      Parameters:
      color - the color specified as an integer.

    • SetLineWidth

      public void SetLineWidth(float width)
      Sets the width of this line.
      Parameters:
      width - the width.

    • setCornerRadius

      public void setCornerRadius(float r)
      Sets the corner radius.
      Parameters:
      r - the radius.

    • SetURIAction

      public void SetURIAction(String uri)
      Sets the URI for the "click rect" action.
      Parameters:
      uri - the URI

    • SetGoToAction

      public void SetGoToAction(String key)
      Sets the destination key for the action.
      Parameters:
      key - the destination name.

    • SetAltDescription

      public Rect SetAltDescription(String altDescription)
      Sets the alternate description of this rect.
      Parameters:
      altDescription - the alternate description of the rect.
      Returns:
      this Rect.

    • SetActualText

      public Rect SetActualText(String actualText)
      Sets the actual text for this rect.
      Parameters:
      actualText - the actual text for the rect.
      Returns:
      this Rect.

    • setStructureType

      public Rect setStructureType(String structureType)
      Sets the type of the structure.
      Parameters:
      structureType - the structure type.
      Returns:
      this Rect.

    • SetPattern

      public void SetPattern(String pattern)
      Sets the line dash pattern that controls the pattern of dashes and gaps used to stroke paths.
      Parameters:
      pattern - the line dash pattern.

    • SetFillShape

      public void SetFillShape(boolean fillShape)
      Sets the private fillShape variable. If the value of fillShape is true - the rect is filled with the current brush color.
      Parameters:
      fillShape - the value used to set the private fillShape variable.

    • PlaceIn

      public void PlaceIn(Rect rect, float xOffset, float yOffset)
      Places this rect in the another rect.
      Parameters:
      rect - the other rect.
      xOffset - the x offset from the top left corner of the rect.
      yOffset - the y offset from the top left corner of the rect.

    • ScaleBy

      public void ScaleBy(float factor)
      Scales this rect by the specified factor.
      Parameters:
      factor - the factor used to scale the rect.

    • DrawOn

      public float[] DrawOn(Page page) throws Exception
      Draws this rect on the specified page.
      Parameters:
      page - the page to draw this rect on.
      Returns:
      x and y coordinates of the bottom right corner of this component.
      Throws:
      Exception
